title: [codereview-1] validate_ipv6_packet: payload bounds check prevents overflow
description: After edit to slip_transport.c:141-157: Added explicit uint16_t payload_len check against SLIP_LCI_MTU - IPV6_HDR_LEN before computing expected. This eliminates any possibility of integer overflow in the addition (even if size_t were 16-bit). Updated error to be more specific. P4 finding treated as real work per instructions. Verified no wrap in (size_t) cast. Test coverage via existing ZTEST in lichen/tests/slip_transport/src/main.c:191.
close_reason: Fixed in validate_ipv6_packet with safe payload bounds check before addition; 3 clean codereview passes completed with no P0-P4 findings
